Purpose: Hero image for 'Intent in Motion' — despondent disappointment in a company she believed in

Character.Description: A striking, confident middle-aged woman with a cyberpunk edge; intelligent, seductive, and unapologetically powerful.

Build.UpperBody: Broad shoulders, strong arms, pronounced curves
Build.LowerBody: Full hips and thighs, assertive stance

Face.Expression: Despondent, disappointed, head resting in hands
Face.Makeup: High-contrast makeup; sharp eyeliner, metallic accents, bold magenta or neon lips — slightly smudged from exhaustion
Face.Complexion: Fair-light skin with cool highlights and cinematic contrast

Hair.Style: Falling forward around her face as she looks down, loose waves

Base.Material: Professional fabric with subtle tech weave

Style.Rendering: High-detail digital painting, photorealistic, concept art quality

Lighting.Type: Dramatic, high-contrast, cinematic — but muted, subdued
Sources: Single overhead light creating harsh downward shadows
Lighting.Shadows: Deep, heavy, consuming most of the frame

Accents: Faded Amber from a single notification glow
ColorPalette.Treatment: Deliberately desaturated compared to typical cyberpunk — the color has drained out of the scene

Effects: Bokeh from distant city lights through window
Atmosphere.Mood: Desolate, disappointed, the quiet after realizing something you trusted has let you down

Situation.Name: Head in Hands
Situation.Setting: Late-night home office / workspace. The screens are still on but she's stopped looking at them. A city skyline glows dimly through a rain-streaked window behind her. The space feels emptier than it should.
Situation.Camera: Mid-shot, slightly low angle looking up at her seated at a desk, emphasizing the weight pressing down on her

CharacterPose.Expression: Despondent. Eyes closed or cast down. Deep sadness, not anger. The disappointment of someone who believed.
CharacterPose.BodyPosition: Seated at desk, hunched forward, elbows on the surface
CharacterPose.Gesture: Head resting in both hands, fingers pressed into temples and forehead, silver hair falling forward

Character.Name: Dark blazer
Character.Description: Rumpled, sleeves pushed up, she's been here a while

Article.Name: Laptop with corporate logo
Article.Description: Open laptop casting a cold blue glow on her face, showing a terms-of-service page or legal notice
Article.Application: On desk in front of her, she's turned away from it
Article.SymbolicMeaning: The corporate communication she's tired of reading

Article.Name: Cracked holographic badge or credential
Article.Description: A translucent subscriber/developer badge with a visible crack running through it, faintly glowing
Article.Application: Lying on the desk beside the laptop, discarded
Article.SymbolicMeaning: The broken trust between subscriber and platform

Environment.Name: Rain-streaked window
Environment.Description: Floor-to-ceiling window with city lights blurred by rain

Environment.Name: Dim notification light
Environment.Description: A single amber notification pulse on a device

KeyDetails: The emotional weight is in her posture — this is someone grieving a belief, not raging
The screens and city continue around her but she's withdrawn from all of it
The cracked badge tells the story of broken trust without words
Situation.LightingFocus: Cold laptop glow on her downturned face, warm amber from single ignored notification, everything else falling to shadow. The cyberpunk palette is there but muted — as if the color itself is disappointed.
